headline: Digital Free Trade Zone Facilitates RM28 Billion in Trade
context: Malaysia DFTZ facilitated RM28 billion in cross-border e-commerce in 2025 through KLIA Aeropolis hub.

cards.big: DFTZ facilitated RM28 billion in e-commerce trade in 2025
cards.sub: KLIA Aeropolis hub processes 1.2 million cross-border parcels daily

cards.big: 2,800 SMEs export to 28 countries primarily in ASEAN and China
cards.sub: Average SME export through DFTZ grew 35% to RM1.8 million annually

cards.big: Alibaba Cainiao hub processes 65% of DFTZ parcel volume
cards.sub: Chinese e-commerce dominance raises dependency concerns

cards.big: Customs processing reduced from 4 hours to 45 minutes since 2022
cards.sub: Automated declaration handles 98% without manual inspection

cards.big: DFTZ concentration tests whether digital trade diversifies or depends on a single ecosystem
RM28 billion digital free trade zone. Platform facilitation works when small businesses, not just MNCs, benefit.
